title: glandularia atacamensis
intro: Glandularia atacamensis, also known as Chilean veronica, is a species of flowering plant in the family Veronicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Glandularia atacamensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. Glandularia atacamensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal benefits.
